interfaces.name: getHomePageOverview
interfaces.description: Get home page overview: tagline, key research areas, featured publication/project/event, and basic counts.

featuredProject.description: Heuristic choice, e.g., highest-funded active project, or null if none.

nextUpcomingEvent.description: Soonest upcoming public event, or null if none.

interfaces.name: getPublicationFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options and ranges for the publications page UI.

interfaces.name: searchPublications
interfaces.description: Search and filter publications with sorting and pagination for the publications listing page.

authorsDisplay.description: Human-readable author list, e.g., 'Smith J., Doe A.'.

interfaces.name: getReadingListsForPublications
interfaces.description: Get existing reading lists to allow users to add publications to them.

interfaces.name: savePublicationsToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add one or more publications to a reading list, creating the list if needed.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Existing reading list to use if provided.

parameters.name: listName
parameters.description: Name of new reading list to create if listId is not provided.

interfaces.name: addPublicationToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add a single publication (usually from its detail page) to an existing or new reading list.

parameters.name: listName
parameters.description: Used to create a new list if listId is not provided.

interfaces.name: getPublicationDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific publication, including related projects and events.

interfaces.name: getPublicationCitation
interfaces.description: Generate or retrieve a formatted citation for a publication in a given style.

interfaces.name: getNotesList
interfaces.description: Get all notes in the Notes & Clipboard section.

interfaces.name: createNote
interfaces.description: Create a new note, optionally associated with a publication.

interfaces.name: updateNote
interfaces.description: Update an existing note's title and/or content.

interfaces.name: deleteNote
interfaces.description: Delete an existing note.

interfaces.name: getProjectFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the research projects listing page.

interfaces.name: searchProjects
interfaces.description: Search and filter research projects with optional keyword, status, funding, and team size filters.

interfaces.name: getProjectDetail
interfaces.description: Get full project details including team members, funding, and related items.

interfaces.name: getBookmarkFolders
interfaces.description: Get all bookmark folders for organizing bookmarks such as projects or events.

interfaces.name: saveProjectBookmark
interfaces.description: Bookmark a project and optionally place it into a specified or newly created folder.

parameters.name: folderName
parameters.description: Name of folder to create if folderId is not provided.

interfaces.name: getCourseFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get term, level, and credit filter options for the Teaching & Courses page.

interfaces.name: searchCourses
interfaces.description: Search and filter courses taught by the researcher, with sorting and pagination.

interfaces.name: getCourseLists
interfaces.description: Get existing course lists for saving selected courses.

interfaces.name: saveCoursesToCourseList
interfaces.description: Add one or more courses to a course list, creating the list if needed.

parameters.name: listName
parameters.description: Name of new course list to create if listId is not provided.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Talks & Events page, including access types and location hints.

defaultDateRangeDaysAhead.description: Default window for upcoming events, e.g., 180.

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search and filter events/talks by date range, location, and access type.

startDateTime.description: ISO 8601 datetime string for range start.

endDateTime.description: ISO 8601 datetime string for range end.

locationCities.description: City names to include, e.g., ['New York'].

includeOnline.description: Whether to include events with locationType = 'online'.

interfaces.name: getAttendLists
interfaces.description: Get existing 'Attend' or other event-attend lists for saving events.

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get full event details including reminders and saved/attend status.

interfaces.name: saveEventToAttendList
interfaces.description: Save an event into an Attend list, creating the list if needed.

parameters.name: listName
parameters.description: Name of new Attend list to create, e.g., 'Attend'.

interfaces.name: setEventReminder
interfaces.description: Set or update a reminder for an event, optionally tied to an Attend list.

parameters.name: reminderOffsetDays
parameters.description: Days before the event start, e.g., 3.

interfaces.name: getSavedLists
interfaces.description: Get all saved lists (reading lists, course lists, Attend lists, etc.) with basic item counts.

interfaces.name: getSavedListDetails
interfaces.description: Get the contents of a specific saved list, with type-specific item summaries.

interfaces.name: renameSavedList
interfaces.description: Rename an existing saved list.

interfaces.name: deleteSavedList
interfaces.description: Delete a saved list and all its items.

interfaces.name: removeItemFromSavedList
interfaces.description: Remove a single item from a saved list.

interfaces.name: getBookmarkOverview
interfaces.description: Get all bookmark folders and their bookmarks for the Bookmarks page.

interfaces.name: createBookmarkFolder
interfaces.description: Create a new bookmark folder.

interfaces.name: renameBookmarkFolder
interfaces.description: Rename an existing bookmark folder.

interfaces.name: deleteBookmarkFolder
interfaces.description: Delete a bookmark folder, optionally deleting its bookmarks.

interfaces.name: moveBookmark
interfaces.description: Move a bookmark to a different folder.

interfaces.name: removeBookmark
interfaces.description: Remove a bookmark from all folders.

interfaces.name: getContactFormConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration for the Contact & Supervision form, including reasons and scheduler settings.

interfaces.name: getAvailabilitySlots
interfaces.description: Get available supervision/meeting slots for the embedded scheduler over a date range.

interfaces.name: submitContactRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a contact/supervision request with optional preferred meeting slot.

interfaces.name: getProfileSettings
interfaces.description: Get profile and display settings, including tagline, primary keywords, and publication display configuration.

interfaces.name: updateProfileTaglineAndKeywords
interfaces.description: Update the public profile tagline and primary research keywords (exactly three).

parameters.name: primaryResearchKeywords
parameters.description: Must contain exactly three keyword strings.

interfaces.name: updatePublicationsDisplayPreferences
interfaces.description: Update how many publications are shown on the main profile and their sort order.

parameters.name: publicationsDisplayCount
parameters.description: Number of publications to show on the main profile page.

interfaces.name: setFeaturedPublication
interfaces.description: Set a single publication as featured on the profile. Clears any previous featured publication.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get narrative biography and research themes for the About page.

interfaces.name: getCurriculumVitae
interfaces.description: Get CV content for in-browser display and download metadata.

downloadFileId.description: Identifier for the downloadable CV file.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateSavedListByNameAndType
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find an existing SavedList by name and listType or create it if it does not exist.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateBookmarkFolderByName
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find or create a BookmarkFolder with a given name.

helperFunctions.name: _applyPublicationFiltersAndSort
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply filter and sort logic to Publication records.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateReminderDateTime
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute reminderDateTime based on event startDateTime and reminderOffsetDays.

helperFunctions.name: _getProfileSettingsSingleton
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the single ProfileSettings record.
